## Today's Git Activity (6 PRs merged)

### PR #277 — ZAO Music Entity (doc 475)

- **Category:** Research / Architecture decision
- **Source:** GodCloud + Iman conversation transcript (2026-04-22)
- **Summary:** Full spec for ZAO Music, a web3 artist support collective. Key decisions: BetterCallZaal Strategies LLC as holding entity, BMI publisher registration ($250 one-time), DistroKid Musician Plus for distribution, 0xSplits on Base for on-chain payouts, no exclusive deals, 90-day termination clauses. First release = the 10-artist cipher Zaal is already planning, timed to ZAOstock Oct 3 promo cycle.
- **Tags:** music, entity, publishing, distribution, bmI, distrokid, 0xsplits

### PR #275 — Foundercheck BLOCK ICP Resolution (doc 474)

- **Category:** Research / Strategic
- **Source:** Foundercheck export v1.2, viability score 3.95 (BLOCK gate)
- **Summary:** Resolved the 3-in-one customer problem that caused foundercheck to score BLOCK. Root cause: input profile mixed three unrelated audiences (learner, artist, helper). Fix = collapse to one ICP — independent musician, already shipping, no label, frustrated by streaming economics. Education wedge rejected (per doc 470 behavioral data). Distribution infrastructure + behavioral nudges at decision moments is the real value prop. Next step: re-run foundercheck session 2 with corrected ICP, target viability >5.5.
- **Tags:** foundercheck, icp, strategy, bcz, distribution, behavioral
